CONTENT.Early life: Born in Vénissieux, a town in the Lyon Metropolis, Soumaré first played with ASM Vénissieux before joining Lyon in 2015, signing his first professional contract there in 2020.
CONTENT.Club career: Soumaré made his professional debut for Lyon on 23 December 2020, coming on as a late substitute for Tino Kadewere in a 3–0 Ligue 1 home win over Nantes.On 16 June 2021, Soumaré joined Ligue 2 side Dijon on loan for the 2021–22 season.On 4 December 2021, he was loaned to Championnat National club Annecy.On 4 August 2022, Soumaré moved on loan to Bourg-en-Bresse.
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Soumaré is of Malian descent. He is a youth international for France.

SUMMARY: Yahya Soumaré (born 23 June 2000) is a French professional footballer who plays as a forward for  Championnat National club Orléans.
